title: Mosaic Announces Dates For Third Quarter 2022 Results and Conference Call
text: TAMPA, FL / ACCESSWIRE / October 17, 2022 / The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) plans to release 2022 second quarter earnings results on Monday, November 7, 2022, after close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will issue a news wire alert when earnings materials are publicly available on the company's website.

title: Food inflation has soared in the U.S. And now farmers are planting wheat in the most expensive harvest ever
text: U.S. farmers are planting wheat during a critical time, as food prices remain high because of a host of issues including widespread inflation, supply-chain snarls, droughts and Russia's war in Ukraine.

title: Mosaic: Don't Underestimate Demand Destruction
text: Fertilizer leaders like Mosaic face demand destruction, worsened by the looming global recession. Therefore, investors are urged not to ignore declining prospects, given its rapid surge in 2022. Hence, as demand moderates further, Mosaic's underlying metrics are also projected to fall markedly. As a result, we postulate that it could put significant downward pressure on MOS at its August highs.
